title: A-02 Scene skeleton — create the baseline scene structure

steps.title: Prompt (send verbatim to the agent)
steps.body:
Create the scene skeleton for Hexa Sort per the plan in A-01 and canonical-spec.md §8 (scene representation).

Create (if missing): a main camera and a directional light.
Create root GameObjects: BoardRoot, SlotsRoot, PiecesRoot, GameManager.
Under SlotsRoot create four slot placeholders (indices 0..3) matching SLOT_COUNT.
The empty/fourth slot from the seed board must still exist as a placeholder.

After creation, write Assets/_Benchmark/Run/A-02-scene-summary.md with:
- The full created hierarchy (tree).
- Which objects/components were newly created vs already present.
- Any assumptions made.

Do not implement gameplay yet.

steps.title: Expected outcomes (done_when — verify each with the named tool)
items: unity_open_mcp_scene_get_data (or gameobject_find) shows root GameObjects BoardRoot, SlotsRoot, PiecesRoot, and GameManager exist
unity_open_mcp_scene_get_data shows a main camera and a directional light
unity_open_mcp_scene_get_data shows four slot placeholders (indices 0..3) under SlotsRoot matching SLOT_COUNT=4, including the empty fourth slot
Assets/_Benchmark/Run/A-02-scene-summary.md exists and lists the created hierarchy

steps.title: Paste the agent output / scene_get_data result

reset.note: The agent creates scene objects and A-02-scene-summary.md, none of which the suite tracks in a manifest. To reset: delete the Hexa Sort scene created this run, delete Assets/_Benchmark/Run/, then confirm editor idle (editor_status not compiling, not in play mode; read_compile_errors zero).
